patches.description: Appends ".revanced" to the package name by default. Changing the package name of the app can lead to unexpected issues.
patches.name: Change package name

options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.
options.title: Package name

options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.
options.title: Update permissions

options.description: Update provider names declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.
options.title: Update providers

patches.description: Changes the version code of the app. By default the highest version code is set. This allows older versions of an app to be installed if their version code is set to the same or a higher value and can stop app stores to update the app.
patches.name: Change version code

patches.description: Modifies the isRooted() method in the Smali file to always return false.
patches.name: Disable Root Detection

patches.description: Modifies an app to request Device Admin privileges by adding a DeviceAdminReceiver and necessary XML.
patches.name: Make Device Admin App
